verify.rule: Ensure all necessary fields are included in the blueprint.
Ensure the estimated mass does not exceed the budget.
Each part_tree feature should correspond to a specific geometry operation.
Interfaces should be defined with matching connection types and DOFs between subsystems.
Critical joints must specify locking methods and preload/torque values.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment during assembly due to complex bolt patterns.
risk.mit: Implement precise alignment guides and visual indicators.

risk.desc: Cooling efficiency may be compromised if inlet is obstructed.
risk.mit: Design cooling inlet with sufficient clearance and airflow.

risk.desc: Structural integrity could be affected if rib stiffeners are improperly positioned.
risk.mit: Specify exact placement and orientation of rib stiffeners.

risk.desc: Thermal expansion may cause stress on motor mount if not accounted for.
risk.mit: Include thermal expansion considerations in design.

risk.desc: Insufficient support structure might lead to warping during FDM printing.
risk.mit: Add additional support structures where needed.

risk.desc: Potential thermal expansion issues due to composite materials.
risk.mit: Include thermal expansion gaps and use temperature-resistant adhesives.

risk.mit: Optimize size and placement of lightening pockets based on finite element analysis.

risk.mit: Ensure battery bay does not interfere with load paths and includes proper support structures.

risk.mit: Implement precise manufacturing tolerances and regular alignment checks.

risk.mit: Use waterproof seals and conduct thorough environmental testing.

verify.rule: All required fields in the schema are present and correctly filled.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment during assembly due to tight tolerances.
risk.mit: Implement visual alignment aids and ensure proper tooling.

risk.desc: Risk of cable damage due to inadequate strain relief.
risk.mit: Add strain relief features at every cable exit point.

risk.mit: Label and key connectors to prevent mis-mating.

risk.desc: Risk of thermal stress on servos if heat dissipation is insufficient.
risk.mit: Increase thermal conductivity of the wing structure near servos.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure due to overloading of snap-fit joints.
risk.mit: Review and possibly increase the clearance of snap-fit joints.

risk.mit: Implement alignment aids and visual indicators on both parts.

risk.desc: Risk of harness damage due to inadequate strain relief at cable exits.
risk.mit: Ensure strain relief features are included at all cable exits.
